name: formal-methods-book
description: 仕様記述・模型検査・定理証明を統合的に学ぶ技術書

scripts.start: npm run build && npx http-server docs -p 4321 -c-1
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run lint-structure && npm run check-links
scripts.lint-structure: node scripts/check-tool-blocks.js && node scripts/check-tool-example-links.js && node scripts/check-manuscript-guardrails.js docs/chapters && node scripts/check-manuscript-guardrails.js docs/appendices && node scripts/check-manuscript-guardrails.js docs/introduction && node scripts/check-manuscript-guardrails.js docs/afterword && node scripts/check-manuscript-guardrails.js docs/glossary && npm run qa:bilingual
scripts.check-links: markdown-link-check -q -p src/ja/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/ja/glossary/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/ja/chapters/*.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/ja/appendices/appendix-*.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/ja/introduction/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/ja/afterword/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/en/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/en/glossary/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/en/chapters/*.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/en/appendices/appendix-*.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/en/introduction/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p src/en/afterword/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p docs/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p docs/afterword/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p docs/en/index.md && markdown-link-check -q -p docs/en/afterword/index.md

author: 太田和彦（株式会社アイティードゥ）
